commits.message: [agent:engineer][task:ops-0014] fix GitHub Actions submodule URLs and Python install path
commits.author: engineer

handoff_notes: Review found multiple clean-clone CI defects. Commit e610a39 fixed recursive submodule checkout and the missing metrics-collector .gitmodules entry. A second review pass found two more likely causes for failed GitHub checks: SSH-only submodule URLs in .gitmodules and the Python install step running at repo root instead of projects/digital-research/src. A follow-up fix branch now addresses both. Awaiting GitHub Actions validation before closing the task.
review_notes: Review on the merged clean checkout found real CI defects. First pass: submodule-backed paths were empty in a clean clone, and metrics-collector was missing from .gitmodules. Second pass: .gitmodules still used SSH-only GitHub URLs, which commonly break Actions submodule checkout, and the Python workflow installed from repo root even though the package root is projects/digital-research/src. A follow-up fix branch addresses those issues. Keep task in review until GitHub checks are green.
